creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: Simplifying title

^Triage: If there is a changelog or release notes URL available for this version, please add it to the URL field.

Q/A:  Makefile: [14]: use a tab (not space) after a variable name
 Makefile: [15]: use a tab (not space) after a variable name
 Makefile: [16]: use a tab (not space) after a variable name
 Makefile: [17]: use a tab (not space) after a variable name
 Makefile: possible direct use of "CFLAGS+=     -I/usr/local" found. if so, use ${PREFIX} or ${LOCALBASE}, as appropriate.
 Makefile: possible direct use of "LDFLAGS+=    -L/usr/local" found. if so, use ${PREFIX} or ${LOCALBASE}, as appropriate.
 files: empty directory should be removed.

^Triage: Please confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere at least).

Thanks!
